name: Valley Oak
description_short: This is not a financial services company. Valley Oak (Quercus lobata) is a tree species native to California's interior valleys, profiled on Calscape.org, a botanical plant database.
description_long: Valley Oak is not a consumer finance company of any kind. The website https://calscape.org/Quercus-lobata-(Valley-Oak) is a botanical resource page on Calscape.org, a California native plant database maintained by the Consortium of California Herbaria. The profile provides horticultural and ecological information about Quercus lobata, the Valley Oak tree species. This is a scientific and gardening reference tool, not a financial services provider. The content describes the tree's physical characteristics, growth patterns, habitat requirements, wildlife benefits, and native range across California's valleys. There is no financial product, lending service, credit offering, or monetary transaction capability on this page. The miscategorization as 'payday-alternatives' appears to be a data entry error or automated categorization failure. This company profile should not exist in a consumer finance database.
